title: Triage and apply non-breaking dashboard dependency upgrades

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting step 2 (option 1): categorize remaining audit findings into non-breaking vs breaking paths, then apply safe upgrades and re-audit.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed option-1 non-breaking remediation pass. Updated vulnerable override pins and aligned Tailwind/PostCSS stack plus safe transitive overrides. Vulnerabilities reduced from 66 -> 52 (low 17->15, moderate 32->23, high 15->12, critical unchanged at 2). Remaining issues are primarily Amplify backend toolchain transitive chains (fast-xml-parser/handlebars), Next.js advisory requiring major upgrade to next 16.x, jest-environment-jsdom major bump, and @excalidraw path requiring version move judged major by audit.
